lacao-baked-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Lacão Baked In The Oven
instructions: Fix the pig's knee and get it cooked in salty water.

Drain the meat, place it on a tray and add the chopped garlic teeth, the laurel leaf, white wine, sweet pepper, salt, pyri, 300 ml of cooking water and olive oil. Involve and let marinate for 30 minutes.
After the specified time, take the tray to the oven, preheated at 180°C, for 30 minutes. Serve with sautéed vegetables.

lamb-meatballs-with-pecan-romesco.name: Lamb Meatballs With Pecan Romesco

ingredients.item: Red chile (such as fresno or jalapeño)
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium pot over medium. Cook onion, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Add garlic; cook, stirring, until golden brown, about 2 minutes. Stir in tomato, chile, and roasted red peppers, cover pot, and cook until tender, about 5 minutes. Let cool slightly.

Transfer onion mixture to a food processor and add pecans, paprika, salt, black pepper, and remaining ½ cup oil; process until smooth. Transfer pecan romesco to a small bowl, cover, and set aside until ready to serve.
Do Ahead: Romesco can be made 2 days ahead. Chill.

Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium. Cook onion, stirring often, until browned, 6–8 minutes. Add mushrooms, garlic, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt; cook, stirring occasionally, until tender and liquid evaporates, about 5 minutes. Add zucchini; cook until softened but without taking on color, about 2 minutes. Let cool.
Transfer vegetable mixture to a large bowl. Add egg, lamb, cream, paprika, black pepper, ¼ cup panko, and remaining 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and mix well.

Divide mixture into 12 equal pieces; roll into balls. Make an indentation in the center of a meatball, then place a piece of cheese inside; enclose with meat, sealing in well. Repeat with remaining meatballs and cheese.
Preheat oven to 375°. Scatter some panko onto a large plate. Gently roll each meatball in panko to coat.

Melt butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Arrange meatballs in pan 1" apart and cook until golden brown, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to a 13x9" rimmed baking sheet and bake in oven until cooked through and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center registers 145°, 12–14 minutes.
To serve, spread pecan romesco over plates and arrange meatballs on top. Scatter cilantro over.

lamb-ribs-argiro.name: Lamb Ribs
instructions: Start by heating the olive oil in a deep pan over medium to high heat.
Add salt and pepper to the ribbs and add 5 minutes on each side.
Add the garage hole and continue cooking for 4–5–1 until the meat is well cooked.
Remove the ribbs on a platter and keep them warm.
Pour it with the liquids and keep 2-3 tabletspoons of the liquids.
Add the pan back to the heat and add the grabes, which we have Washed and drained.
At this stage, remove and disccard garlic.
Add the rosemary, lower the heat and simmer for 6 ́-7', soften the grilles.
Add the wine and petimese and add salt, pepper in the sauce.
Leave the pan on fire for 3–4–1, until it thinks well and the sauce softens. The sauce must be made like honey.
Serve the rib on a platter and pour with the grave sauce.
Escort them with salt and baking potatoes with orange and mustard!

Corta los tomates cherry en 4 partes y los aguacates en julianas. Reserva.

Agrega la nata, sal y pimienta y vuelve a mezclar.

instructions: 1. Pour biscuits, melt and cool the margar.

lemon-cookies-argiro.name: Lemon Cookies

ingredients.item: 170 grbutyr or margarine at room temperature
170 grbutyr or margarine at room temperature

instructions: Preheat the evening to 160–1703. Shake the flower, baking powder and salt.
Wash the lemons and, after wiping them, take 1 teaspoon of sweet zest and 2 tablespoons of lemon juice.
Beat butter, sugar (110 g) and icing in a bowl for a few minutes until they become cream.
Add lemon zest, juice and vanilla and either lower the mixer very much or mix with spatula, gradually incorporating solid materials into the mixture.
Divide the dough into two equal parts and wrap it with membrane, giving it a roll shape.
Freeze the dough in the freezer if we are in a hurry or in the refrigerator if we have more time.
When it freezes well to cut, remove the membrane and, with a sharp knife, cut slices about 0.5 cm thick.
We spread paper or silicone sheet on the sheet and we grind the biscuits, leaving enough distance between them because they spread. Sprinkle with the remaining sugar (2 tablespoons).
Bake for about 12–15 minutes, until the edges are slightly golden.
Remove from oven and after 5 minutes, carefully transfer to a grill to cool well.
Lemon cookies match perfectly with this lemon cream.

lemonade-iced-tea.name: Lemonade Iced Tea
instructions: Place sugar and tea bags in a 1-gallon glass jar; fill with boiling water. Steep at room temperature for 2 hours.
Discard tea bags. Stir in lemonade concentrate. Refrigerate tea until cool.

lemony-brothy-beans-with-asparagus.name: Lemony Brothy Beans With Asparagus

ingredients.prep: white and pale green and dark green parts separated, thinly sliced
zest removed in wide strips, lemon halved

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: trimmed, thinly sliced on a diagonal

instructions: Heat ⅓ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Cook 1 bunch spring onions or scallions, white and pale green parts thinly sliced, and 6 garlic cloves, coarsely chopped, stirring often, until golden brown, about 5 minutes.

Add wide zest of 1 lemon and 1 cup dried cannellini (white kidney) beans, soaked overnight, drained, then pour in 4 cups low-sodium vegetable or chicken broth and 3 cups water. Bring to a boil, stirring and scraping up any browned bits with a wooden spoon.
Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until beans are tender and broth is reduced by nearly half, 1½–2 hours. Taste and season with kosher salt if needed.

Just before serving, toss 1 small bunch asparagus, trimmed, thinly sliced on a diagonal, 1 bunch spring onions or scallions, dark green parts thinly sliced, ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and remaining 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin oil in a small bowl. Squeeze in juice from 1 lemon; toss asparagus salad again to coat.
Ladle beans into bowls or onto a deep platter; top with asparagus salad. Serve with country-style bread.

lemony-grilled-okra.name: Lemony Grilled Okra

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Toss okra with olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper in a bowl.
Grill okra on the preheated grill until 1 side is bright green with visible grill marks, about 5 minutes. Turn okra, cover grill, and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Transfer okra to a serving bowl; sprinkle with lemon juice, rosemary, and thyme.

lets-cook-this-moroccan-shakshuka-comede.name: Let's Cook This Moroccan Shakshuka

ingredients.item: 2  pimentones o morrones (uno rojo y otro amarillo)

instructions: It starts with cutting them into small or tanned squares.
A frying pan adds some olive oil to start sniffing the vegetables.
First add the garlic and once you are starting to get golden add the chopped onion, remove well and then add the pimentons. Cook them with low heat till they are soft.
He later adds tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, cumin, salt, pepper and cheese. Mix very well and let cook for 10 minutes with low and covered fire.
Take a pack, break an egg (without beating) and season with salt and pepper to suit. Gently add to the frying pan so that it doesn't break. Fold them all up.
Cover them again till the eggs are ready. No need to get them completely cooked.
Take them out of the fire and decorate with finely minced cilantro.
And ready, your Shakshuka's finished!

lighter-green-bean-and-portobello-mushro.name: Lighter Green Bean And Portobello Mushroom Casserole

ingredients.item: 98% fat-free condensed cream of mushroom soup

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray an 8x11-inch casserole dish with nonstick cooking spray.
Slice 1/2 the portobello mushrooms and line the prepared pan with them. Chop the remaining 1/2 and set aside.

Combine mushroom soup and half-and-half in a medium bowl. Add chopped mushrooms and green beans. Stir in black pepper and white pepper. Add 1/2 cup fried onions and and stir until just mixed. Pour over sliced mushrooms in the prepared casserole dish.

Bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes. Remove from the oven and top with remaining fried onions. Return to the oven and bake 5 minutes more. Remove from the oven and allow to cool slightly before serving.

lobster-risotto-recipe-comedera.name: Lobster Risotto Recipe
instructions: Limpia muy bien las colas de langosta con abundante agua.
Put a pot with enough water to boil and while at its boiling point, add lobster tails and cook for about 20 minutes.
Una vez listas, retira del agua y deja entibiar. Reserva el agua para el risotto.
When the locusts are at room temperature, remove the meat with care and care.
Trocea los dientes de ajo y filetea la cebolla.
Calienta una cazuela y agrega la mantequilla. Cuando se derrita, incorpora los dientes de ajo y la cebolla. Saltea por unos dos minutos.
Agrega el arroz y mezcla para que se impregne de la mantequilla.
Vierte el vino blanco, sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla y cocina hasta que el alcohol se evapore.
Add the first cup of lobster and mix while cooking with medium heat. Without stopping to move, pour the rest of the stock little by little till she's making herself cream.
Once the rice with its creamy texture, rectify salt and pepper. It incorporates lobster and parmesan cheese. Mix and finish cooking till creamy and delicious.
It serves with lobster tails to decorate and some shredded parsley.

lord-baltimore-cake.name: Lord Baltimore Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour three 9 inch round layer cake pans.
In small bowl combine flour, baking powder and salt. In another small mixer bowl beat egg yolks until thick and lemon colored; set aside.

In large mixer bowl combine butter and sugar. Beat until very light and fluffy, scraping bowl occasionally. Beat in egg yolks. With mixer at low speed add dry ingredients alternately with milk and vanilla, starting and ending with dry ingredients. Divide evenly among prepared pans. Spread to edges.
Bake at 177°C (175 degrees C) for 20 to 25 minutes, until golden. Let cool in pans for 10 minutes. Turn out onto wire racks to cool completely.

Make Seven Minute Frosting (see footnote). Remove one third of the Seven Minute Frosting and place it in a mixing bowl with the macaroon crumbs, pecans, almonds, cherries, lemon juice, and orange rind. Fold together until thoroughly blended. Use this mixture as the filling between the three cake layers, and use the remaining 2/3 of the frosting to cover the tops and sides of the cake.

low-carb-chicken-and-mushroom-soup.name: Low-carb Chicken And Mushroom Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add chicken; sauté until lightly browned, about 3 minutes. Add onion and garlic; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes. Stir in mushrooms; sauté until tender, 5 to 10 minutes. Pour in chicken stock and 2 tablespoons tarragon; reduce heat to low. Season with salt. Cover and simmer soup until flavors are combined, about 25 minutes.
Stir cream into soup; cook until heated through but not boiling. Serve soup with pepper and remaining tarragon on top.

low-carb-keto-moscow-mule.name: Low-carb Keto Moscow Mule
instructions: Divide vodka and lime juice between 2 copper mugs; divide ice cubes and sugar-free ginger beer between mugs. Stir to combine. Garnish each with a lime wedge.

low-sugar-strawberry-jam.name: Low-sugar Strawberry Jam

ingredients.prep: hull, then crush one layer at a time using potato masher)

ingredients.item: Ball® realfruit™ low or no-sugar needed pectin
Ball® or kerr® half-pint (8 oz) jars with lids and bands

instructions: Prepare waterbath canner, jars and lids according to manufacturers instructions, if preserving. Prepare and measure ingredients for recipe.
Combine prepared fruit with fruit juice in a large saucepan. Gradually stir in Ball RealFruit Low or No-Sugar Needed Pectin. Bring mixture to a full rolling boil.
Add sugar, sugar substitute, or honey, if using. Return mixture to a full rolling boil. Boil hard 1 minute, stirring constantly. Remove from heat. Skim foam if necessary.
Ladle hot jam into hot jars, one at a time, leaving 1/4 inch headspace. Wipe rims. Center lids on jars. Apply bands and adjust to fingertip tight.
Place filled jars in canner ensuring jars are covered by 1 to 2 inches of water. Place lid on canner. Bring water to gentle, steady boil.
Process jars for 10 minutes, adjusting for altitude. Turn off heat, remove lid and let jars stand for 5 minutes.
Remove jars and cool. Check lids for seal after 24 hours. Lid should not flex up and down when center is pressed. Clean and store according to manufacturers instructions.

lumpia.name: Lumpia
instructions: Make the filling: Heat the oil in a medium pan over medium-high heat.
Add the onion, garlic, ginger, and carrot. Cook for 4 minutes, or until the onion is slightly translucent.
Add the ground pork and cook for about 6 minutes, or until cooked through.
Add the water chestnuts, salt, pepper, and soy sauce. Stir for 2 minutes, then mix in the green onion and cilantro. Remove the pan from the heat and let cool.
Heat about an inch (2 cm) of canola oil in a deep, medium frying pan until it reaches 149°C (150°C).
Lay out one lumpia wrapper in a diamond shape and spoon 2 tablespoons of filling at the bottom of the wrapper, leaving about an inch and a half (3 cm) of space from the bottom point.

Fold the bottom point over the filling, then fold in the edges to create an envelope shape. Roll the wrapper toward the top point. Brush the top point with egg wash and finish the roll to seal the end.
Carefully place four to five lumpia at a time in the hot oil. Frying on each side for 1-2 minutes, or until golden brown. Note: If the lumpia are cooking too fast or burning, reduce the heat.
Remove the lumpia from the oil and drain on a wire rack or paper towels.
Sprinkle with a garnish of cilantro and serve with sweet chili dipping sauce. Optional: Cut lumpia in half.
Enjoy!
